title: slideotter
summary: A local browser studio for structured decks with live previews, compact controls, and one DOM render path.
note: The project turns deck work into a tight loop: plan, edit, compare, apply, validate, archive.

cards.title: Readable specs
cards.body: Slides stay as compact JSON so content, intent, and edits remain easy to inspect.

cards.title: Live workbench
cards.body: Preview, selector, variants, checks, and spec editing stay in one browser loop.

cards.title: Guarded changes
cards.body: Generated options remain temporary until the author compares and applies one.
